title: Fix TP/SL — compute server-side per trade in /api/trades
acceptance:
- /api/trades JSON includes tp_price and sl_price on each non-manual trade
- tp_price is always 0.85
- sl_price for BUY_YES entry_px=0.60 is 0.48
- Manual trades do not have these fields (or they are null)
- No other fields in /api/trades changed
- No other files touched
